mapper.select: select count(1) from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ssh_supported = true
select count(1) from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and agent_supported = true
select count(1) from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and source_type = #{sourceType}
select * from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and env_id = #{envId} and region_id = #{regionId} and host = #{host}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_executor_node (id, tenant_id, env_id, region_id, host, ssh_port, ssh_username, ssh_password, ssh_auth_type, ssh_private_key, java_home, python_path, source_type, ssh_supported, agent_supported, agent_status, connection_status, last_test_message, last_test_at, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{envId}, #{regionId}, #{host}, #{sshPort}, #{sshUsername}, #{sshPassword}, #{sshAuthType}, #{sshPrivateKey}, #{javaHome}, #{pythonPath}, #{sourceType}, #{sshSupported}, #{agentSupported}, #{agentStatus}, #{connectionStatus}, #{lastTestMessage}, #{lastTestAt}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update fp_executor_node set env_id = #{envId}, region_id = #{regionId}, host = #{host}, ssh_port = #{sshPort}, ssh_username = #{sshUsername}, ssh_password = #{sshPassword}, ssh_auth_type = #{sshAuthType}, ssh_private_key = #{sshPrivateKey}, java_home = #{javaHome}, python_path = #{pythonPath}, source_type = #{sourceType}, ssh_supported = #{sshSupported}, agent_supported = #{agentSupported}, agent_status = #{agentStatus}, connection_status = #{connectionStatus}, last_test_message = #{lastTestMessage}, last_test_at = #{lastTestAt}, last_sync_at = #{lastSyncAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_executor_node where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
